PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | findstr /I "pnpm-lock" >nul 2>&1 && (echo BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly. Use pnpm install. && exit 1) || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | findstr /R /C:"git merge" >nul 2>&1 && (echo BLOCK: git merge is not allowed. Use PRs instead. && exit 1) || exit 0

echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | findstr /R /C:"git push" >nul 2>&1 && (echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | findstr /I /R /C:"main" /C:"master" /C:"production" /C:"prod" >nul 2>&1) && (echo BLOCK: Push to protected branches [main/master/production/prod] is not allowed. Push to a feature branch instead. && exit 1) || exit 0
